profile.name: Abdullah Al Arif
profile.title: Full-stack Developer & AI Engineer
profile.bio: Abdullah builds AI-powered portfolio experiences, SaaS backends, and developer tools with a focus on clean architecture and real-world product fit.
experience: Built a multi-tenant AI portfolio chat platform

projects.name: AI Portfolio Assistant
projects.description: A SaaS backend for portfolio chat widgets with n8n orchestration and calendar booking.

projects.name: Developer Dashboard
projects.description: A Streamlit prototype dashboard for managing widget content, analytics, and booking settings.

services.name: Portfolio Chat Assistant
services.description: Deploy a custom AI chat assistant for your portfolio website to answer visitor questions and book meetings.

services.name: Workflow Automation
services.description: Automate content retrieval and booking flows with n8n and backend orchestration.

faq.question: What kind of projects has Abdullah built?
faq.answer: Abdullah has built AI portfolio assistants, backend APIs, developer dashboards, and workflow automations.

faq.question: Can I book a meeting?
faq.answer: Yes — the assistant can help collect your name, email, date, time, and timezone to schedule a meeting.
